title: High-Level Process of Training a Deep Neural Network
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of forward propagation, loss calculation, and backward propagation (backpropagation) used to train a deep learning model.
relationships: Data flows forward through the network to make a prediction
Prediction is compared to true value to calculate loss
Loss gradients are propagated backward through the network
Optimizer uses gradients to update network weights and biases
